title: Pipedrive API tokens should not be disclosed
description: Pipedrive is a CRM platform used for sales pipeline management. API tokens provide access to all CRM data including contacts, deals, organizations, notes, and activity history. Exposing tokens allows complete CRM data exfiltration.
recommendation: Remove Pipedrive API tokens from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at your_company.pipedrive.com/settings/api.
impact: Full access to CRM data including customer contacts, deals, revenue data, communication history, and sales pipeline information.

checks.message: Pipedrive API token detected in variable assignment. Pipedrive API tokens provide full CRM access including all contact and customer records, deal values and pipeline stages, organization and revenue data, email and activity history, and custom field data. Exposing this token allows complete exfiltration of your sales CRM data and competitive intelligence. Rotate immediately at your Pipedrive Settings > API.
